species.notes: Pelser (6-Aug-22): Arthropteris palisotii forms a species complex that includes plants from the Philippines previously identified as Arthropteris beckleri. Research is needed to resolve this species complex.

species.citation: Copel. , PJS 81 (1952) 26 ; Holttum, Fl. Males. ser. 2, 2 (1991) 91; Banaticla & Buot, Pl. Ecol. 180 (2005) 140. = Tectaria loheri Copel. , PJS 81 (1952) 25. ≠ Tectaria grandifolia auct. non (C.Presl) Copel. ; Copel., Fern Fl. Philip. 2 (1960) 314, pro parte.
